name: Freezer Mix Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Hot Cooked Noodle or Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the container of frozen mix into hot water to loosen.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, heat the frozen mix and water until boiling.
3. Reduce the heat and cover, simmering, stirring frequently until the mix is thawed (about 20 minutes).
4. Stir in the sour cream and continue heating.
5. Serve over noodles or rice.
